title: 求解答data structure & algorithm 問題

replies.msg:
有冇人可以幫手解答以下問題.
Consider an unordered list with n integer.
Develop a function find_i_index(L, i) where 'L' is the List and 'i' is the element in the 'i'th index of the list when it is sorted.
For example:
L = (55,42,36,58,29,70) #Sorted_L = (29, 36, 42, 55, 58, 70)
find_i_index(L, 3)
output: 55 #SortedL[3] = 55
find_i_index(L, 2)
output: 42 #SortedL[2] = 42

Parameters:
Can't approach the problem by sorting the List
Can only use List, Stack, Queue
冇學過linear time selection algorithm?

大佬，咁都唔識
你讀it?
手足價 $1000

quote.msg:
有冇人可以幫手解答以下問題.
Consider an unordered list with n integer.
Develop a function find_i_index(L, i) where 'L' is the List and 'i' is the element in the 'i'th index of the list when it is sorted.
For example:
L = (55,42,36,58,29,70) #Sorted_L = (29, 36, 42, 55, 58, 70)
find_i_index(L, 3)
output: 55 #SortedL[3] = 55
find_i_index(L, 2)
output: 42 #SortedL[2] = 42

Parameters:
Can't approach the problem by sorting the List
Can only use List, Stack, Queue

replies.msg: Find i ，不就是從0逐個loop落去直到到達 i?

divide and conquer:
分開個list 成 i 個sublist, 係每個sublist 搵min value. 之後搵所有min values 既 max value.

無記錯CLRS 有linear time揾median, 你自己modify下
個proof
但有可能唔compare啲數，又搵到係第幾個數幾大咩
Btw,個course code係咩，有啲興趣知

newL[55] = (42,36,29)
newL[42] = (36,29)
newL[36] = (29)
newL[58] = (55,42,36,29)
newL[29] = ()
newL[70] = (55,42,36,58,29)

when call find_i_index(L, 3)
let isFound = false;
let min = 9999999;
for each newL, let key = key in newL
if newL.legnth = 3 and key < min ,
=> min = key , isFound = true
return isFound ? min : false;

差唔多咁啦
應該唔洗divide and conquer掛

不過suppose List 冇Key , 自己諗下點樣associated key 同newL

replies.msg:
Sorting係要知道晒成個array既order, 而total既可能性係number of permutation on n elements, 即係有n!咁多個可能性
如果你個algorithm淨係靠"a > b?"呢種query黎sort (i.e., 邊個permutation)
咁worst-case黎講每個comparison淨係reduce number of possibilities by at most half
所以必需要起碼log_2(n!) = O(n log n) many comparisons

Selection algorithm都係comparison based
不過你想知既只係第i-th個element係咩
唔須要知道晒成個ordering
例如你諗下如果你只係想知min係咩
好簡單scan一次就搵到
但係"知道min係咩"只係俾到好少關於成個ordering既information你

replies.msg: 有冇啲lecture notes嚟睇睇

List tmpList = subList(L, 0, i-1); // L[0］to L[i-1] ,O(i)
int maxNum = max(tmpList); //O(i)

for int j = i to L.length-1: //O(n-i)
if maxNum < L[j]:
maxNum =L[i];

return maxNum;

O(i)+O(i)+O(n-i) = O(n+i) = O(n)

利申 可能未訓醒 幫搵搵錯處

如果你個algorithm淨係靠"a > b?"呢種query黎sort (i.e., 邊個permutation)
咁worst-case黎講每個comparison淨係reduce number of possibilities by at most half

replies.msg:
我諗個d唔算係hint
如果係要linear time既話以我所知都係個一個algorithm:
randomized版本:
Let n = |L|
randomly pick an element p from L
partition L into L1 = [elements <= p in L] and L2 = [elements > p in L]
then with decent probability, |L1|, |L2| < 2n/3
if i <= |L1|, recursively find the i-th element in L1
otherwise, recursively find the (i-|L1|)-th element in L2

Deterministic版本:
partition L into n/5 groups of 5 elements (except the last group)
find the median of these n/5 groups
find, recursively, the median of these medians, call it p
partition L into L1 and L2 like the randomized case
the rest are the same as the randomized version

上面implementation可以用array, queue, stack or linked list, 主要都係用黎store L1, L2. Doesn't really matter
(其實array就應該好d, 因為係可以做partition in place, 郁少d data)

btw樓主個題目冇講要咩time complexity
所以如果樓主可以用linear time algorithm for finding median as a black-box
其實佢可以call個個algorithm log(n)次就搵到第i-th個element
不過個running time係O(n log n)咁解姐

replies.msg:
本身你個問題有冇要求要幾快?
冇咩要求既話其實你可以搵i次min就搞掂

int partialSize = L.size / i
List<int> maxValue
int min
for int j =0; j < L.size; j++;
{
currentVal = L.get(i)
if j%partialSize == 0{
if min is not null and j < L.size - 1 {
maxValue.push(min)
}
min = currentVal
}
min = Math.min(min, currentVal)
}
maxValues.push(min)

find max value in maxValues ...
